signatureMove.name: Deafening Blare
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move the enemy 2" directly away. This effect takes place even if the enemy is outside your Melee Range.

abilities.name: Summon the Choir
abilities.description: When this model is deployed or enters play, you may place 4 new friendly Musician Psychopomps in base contact. If deployed, this must be in the deployment zone as normal. This cannot bring a character into play if it is already in play.

abilities.name: Conductor
abilities.description: Target friendly Psychopomp immediately takes any action available to it, irrespective of cost, excluding Jog. Increase the Psychopomp's Melee & Arcane Stat by +1 for each friendly Psychopomp in play for the duration of the action.

abilities.name: Summon an Encore
abilities.description: This action cannot bring a character into play if it is already in play. Place a friendly Psychopomp, which was slain earlier this turn, in base contact with this model.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Move all friendly Psychopomps within the pulse up to X".
The player to your left may move this model 2".
